declarations.description:
A Badge is a visual indicator that represents numbers, such as counters. It also supports a dot-only variant.

[Badge Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-badge--docs)

declarations.description:
Cards are content structures that provide an entry point for more complex and detailed information.

[Card Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-card--docs)
declarations.name: JhCard

cssProperties.description: The card background-color. Defaults to `--jh-color-container-primary-enabled`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-color-background

cssProperties.description: The card border-radius. Defaults to `--jh-border-radius-400`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-border-radius

cssProperties.description: The card box-shadow. Defaults to `--jh-shadow-low`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-shadow

cssProperties.description: The media slot aspect-ratio. Defaults to `auto`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-media-aspect-ratio

cssProperties.description: The media slot padding. Defaults to `0`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-media-space-padding

cssProperties.description: The header text color. Defaults to `--jh-color-content-primary-enabled`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-header-color-text

cssProperties.description: The header slot padding. Defaults to `--jh-dimension-400 --jh-dimension-600 0`. When `padding="small"`, defaults to `--jh-dimension-400 --jh-dimension-400 0`. When `padding="small"` and `show-header-divider`, defaults to `--jh-dimension-400`. When `padding="medium"` or `padding="none'` and `show-header-divider`, defaults to `--jh-dimension-400 --jh-dimension-600`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-header-space-padding

cssProperties.description: The default slot text color. Defaults to `--jh-color-content-primary-enabled`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-default-color-text

cssProperties.description: The default slot padding. Defaults to `--jh-dimension-400 --jh-dimension-600`. When `padding="small"`, defaults to `--jh-dimension-400`. When `padding="none"`, defaults to `--jh-dimension-400 0`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-default-space-padding

cssProperties.description: The footer slot text color. Defaults to `--jh-color-content-secondary-enabled`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-footer-color-text

cssProperties.description: The footer slot padding. Defaults to `0 --jh-dimension-600 --jh-dimension-400`. When `padding="small"`, defaults to `0 --jh-dimension-400 --jh-dimension-400`. When `padding="small"` and `show-footer-divider`, defaults to `--jh-dimension-400`. When `padding="medium"` or `padding="none"` and `show-footer-divider`, defaults to `--jh-dimension-400 --jh-dimension-600`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-footer-space-padding

cssProperties.description: The header title text color. Defaults to `--jh-color-content-primary-enabled`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-header-title-color-text

cssProperties.description: The header subtitle text color. Defaults to `--jh-color-content-secondary-enabled`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-card-header-subtitle-color-text

slots.description: Use to insert card body content.
slots.name: default

slots.description: Use to insert media content in the top section of the card. User may need to add addtional styling to elements such as border, object-fit, etc.
slots.name: jh-card-media

slots.description: Use to insert custom card header layout. Default layout includes `headerTitle` and `headerSubtitle` properties.
slots.name: jh-card-header

slots.description: Use to insert card footer content.
slots.name: jh-card-footer

members.name: footerDividerInset
members.description: Sets the alignment of the left edge of the divider above the footer.

members.name: headerDividerInset
members.description: Sets the alignment of the left edge of the divider below the header.

members.name: titleHeadingLevel
members.description: Informs assistive technologies what heading level the card title represents. Defaults to h2.

members.name: padding
members.description: Sets padding on all slots. Set `padding='none'` to remove padding solely from default slot. To override padding property, set component level token for desired slot.

members.name: showFooterDivider
members.description: Adds a divider above the footer to create a clearer definition between the body and footer.

members.name: showHeaderDivider
members.description: Adds a divider below the header to create a clearer definition between the header and body.

members.name: headerSubtitle
members.description: Adds additional information about the card below the title.

members.name: headerTitle
members.description: Provides context for the content of the card.

attributes.name: footer-divider-inset
attributes.description: Sets the alignment of the left edge of the divider above the footer.

attributes.name: header-divider-inset
attributes.description: Sets the alignment of the left edge of the divider below the header.

attributes.name: show-footer-divider
attributes.description: Adds a divider above the footer to create a clearer definition between the body and footer.

attributes.name: show-header-divider
attributes.description: Adds a divider below the header to create a clearer definition between the header and body.

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description: Sets padding on all slots. Set `padding='none'` to remove padding solely from default slot. To override padding property, set component level token for desired slot.

attributes.name: header-subtitle
attributes.description: Adds additional information about the card below the title.

members.name: value
members.description: Sets the value of the input.

members.name: accessibleLabel
members.description: Sets an `aria-label` on the input field to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

members.name: accessibleLabelClearButton
members.description: Sets an aria-label on the clear button to assist screen reader users. Indicates that activating the button will clear the input field.

members.name: autocomplete
members.description:
Determines whether the browser can provide assistance in filling out the input value and what type of information is expected.
This property will override any autocomplete attribute present on the input's parent form element.

[Visit MDN for information on supported autocomplete values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/autocomplete)

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the input and prevents all user interactions. May cause the input to be ignored by assistive technologies (AT).

members.name: enterkeyhint
members.description:
Specifies which action label or icon to present for the enter key on virtual keyboards.

[Visit MDN for information on supported enterkeyhint values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/enterkeyhint)

members.name: errorText
members.description: Text to be displayed when input has failed validation and `invalid` is true.

members.name: helperText
members.description: Provides additional context or guidance for using the input. For `helper-text` to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

members.name: hideLeftSlot
members.description: Hides the left slot from input.

members.name: hideRightSlot
members.description: Hides the right slot from input.

members.name: inputMask
members.description: Formats the user entered data on input. Does not apply to pasted values. See input mask documentation above for implementation details.

members.name: inputmode
members.description:
Indicates expected input value type and allows for browsers to display appropriate virtual keyboard.

[Visit MDN for information on supported inputmode values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/inputmode)

members.name: invalid
members.description: Sets an `aria-invalid` attribute on input to indicate the value supplied was invalid. Also displays `error-text` and error state styling when set.

members.name: label
members.description: Identifies what data should be entered into the input field.

members.name: maxlength
members.description: Sets the maximum number of characters a user can enter into the field.

members.name: minlength
members.description: Sets the minimum number of characters a user can enter into the field.

members.name: name
members.description: Sets a name for the input control.

members.name: readonly
members.description: Prevents users from changing the input value. Removes all slotted content.

members.name: required
members.description: Indicates a value is required.

members.name: showCharCount
members.description: Displays a character counter at the bottom right corner below the input field.

members.name: showClearButton
members.description: Displays a clear button in the input field when it contains a value and is focused or hovered. Deletes input value when activated.

members.name: showIndicator
members.description: Adds a visual indicator next to the label. Indicates that a value is optional(by default) or required if the `required` property is also set.

members.name: size
members.description: Sets the size of the input.

events.name: jh-input:clear-button-click
events.description: Dispatched when the clear button is activated. Event payload contains the previous value of the input field before it was cleared and can be accessed via `e.detail.previousValue`.

Dispatched when text is selected. Event payload contains the selected text, the starting index of the selection, and the ending index of the selection. These values can be accessed via `e.detail.selected`, `e.detail.selectionStart`, and `e.detail.selectionEnd`.
events.name: jh-select

events.description: Dispatched when the value of the input has changed and input loses focus. Event payload includes the value of the input and can be accessed via `e.detail.value`. Payload also includes the raw/unformatted value when an input mask is applied and can be accessed via `e.detail.rawValue`.
events.name: jh-change

events.description: Dispatched when the value of the input has changed. Event payload includes the value of the input and can be accessed via `e.detail.value`. Payload also includes the raw/unformatted value when an input mask is applied and can be accessed via `e.detail.rawValue`.

events.description: Dispatched when the `maxlength` property is set and it's value is reached.

declarations.name: JhInputSearch

members.name: value
members.description: Sets the value of the input.

members.name: accessibleLabel
members.description: Sets an `aria-label` on the input field to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

members.name: accessibleLabelClearButton
members.description: Sets an aria-label on the clear button to assist screen reader users. Indicates that activating the button will clear the input field.

members.name: autocomplete
members.description:
Determines whether the browser can provide assistance in filling out the input value and what type of information is expected.
This property will override any autocomplete attribute present on the input's parent form element.

[Visit MDN for information on supported autocomplete values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/autocomplete)

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the input and prevents all user interactions. May cause the input to be ignored by assistive technologies (AT).

members.name: enterkeyhint
members.description:
Specifies which action label or icon to present for the enter key on virtual keyboards.

[Visit MDN for information on supported enterkeyhint values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/enterkeyhint)

members.name: errorText
members.description: Text to be displayed when input has failed validation and `invalid` is true.

members.name: helperText
members.description: Provides additional context or guidance for using the input. For `helper-text` to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

members.name: hideLeftSlot
members.description: Hides the left slot from input.

members.name: hideRightSlot
members.description: Hides the right slot from input.

members.name: inputMask
members.description: Formats the user entered data on input. Does not apply to pasted values. See input mask documentation above for implementation details.

members.name: inputmode
members.description:
Indicates expected input value type and allows for browsers to display appropriate virtual keyboard.

[Visit MDN for information on supported inputmode values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/inputmode)

members.name: invalid
members.description: Sets an `aria-invalid` attribute on input to indicate the value supplied was invalid. Also displays `error-text` and error state styling when set.

members.name: label
members.description: Identifies what data should be entered into the input field.

members.name: maxlength
members.description: Sets the maximum number of characters a user can enter into the field.

members.name: minlength
members.description: Sets the minimum number of characters a user can enter into the field.

members.name: name
members.description: Sets a name for the input control.

members.name: readonly
members.description: Prevents users from changing the input value. Removes all slotted content.

members.name: required
members.description: Indicates a value is required.

members.name: showCharCount
members.description: Displays a character counter at the bottom right corner below the input field.

members.name: showClearButton
members.description: Displays a clear button in the input field when it contains a value and is focused or hovered. Deletes input value when activated.

members.name: showIndicator
members.description: Adds a visual indicator next to the label. Indicates that a value is optional(by default) or required if the `required` property is also set.

members.name: size
members.description: Sets the size of the input.

events.description: Dispatched when the clear button is activated. Event payload contains the previous value of the input field before it was cleared and can be accessed via `e.detail.previousValue`.

Dispatched when text is selected. Event payload contains the selected text, the starting index of the selection, and the ending index of the selection. These values can be accessed via `e.detail.selected`, `e.detail.selectionStart`, and `e.detail.selectionEnd`.
events.name: jh-select

events.description: Dispatched when the value of the input has changed and input loses focus. Event payload includes the value of the input and can be accessed via `e.detail.value`. Payload also includes the raw/unformatted value when an input mask is applied and can be accessed via `e.detail.rawValue`.
events.name: jh-change

events.description: Dispatched when the value of the input has changed. Event payload includes the value of the input and can be accessed via `e.detail.value`. Payload also includes the raw/unformatted value when an input mask is applied and can be accessed via `e.detail.rawValue`.

members.name: autoGrow
members.description: Enables the input height to grow automatically to accommodate user input. `auto-grow` will also remove the input's native resize capability.

members.name: cols
members.description: Sets the width of the input field.

members.name: noResize
members.description: Removes native resize capability of the input field.

members.name: rows
members.description: Sets the height of the input field.

members.name: size
members.description: Sets the size of the input.

members.name: wrap
members.description: Specifies how text should be wrapped when submitted in a form. The `cols` property must be set for `wrap='hard'` to take effect.

members.name: readonly
members.description: Prevents users from changing the input value.

members.name: value
members.description: Sets the value of the input.

members.name: accessibleLabel
members.description: Sets an `aria-label` on the input field to assist screen reader users when no visible label is present.

members.name: accessibleLabelClearButton
members.description: Sets an aria-label on the clear button to assist screen reader users. Indicates that activating the button will clear the input field.

members.name: autocomplete
members.description:
Determines whether the browser can provide assistance in filling out the input value and what type of information is expected.
This property will override any autocomplete attribute present on the input's parent form element.

[Visit MDN for information on supported autocomplete values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Attributes/autocomplete)

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the input and prevents all user interactions. May cause the input to be ignored by assistive technologies (AT).

members.name: enterkeyhint
members.description:
Specifies which action label or icon to present for the enter key on virtual keyboards.

[Visit MDN for information on supported enterkeyhint values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/enterkeyhint)

members.name: errorText
members.description: Text to be displayed when input has failed validation and `invalid` is true.

members.name: helperText
members.description: Provides additional context or guidance for using the input. For `helper-text` to be displayed, the `label` property must also be set.

members.name: hideLeftSlot
members.description: Hides the left slot from input.

members.name: hideRightSlot
members.description: Hides the right slot from input.

members.name: inputMask
members.description: Formats the user entered data on input. Does not apply to pasted values. See input mask documentation above for implementation details.

members.name: inputmode
members.description:
Indicates expected input value type and allows for browsers to display appropriate virtual keyboard.

[Visit MDN for information on supported inputmode values](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Global_attributes/inputmode)

members.name: invalid
members.description: Sets an `aria-invalid` attribute on input to indicate the value supplied was invalid. Also displays `error-text` and error state styling when set.

members.name: label
members.description: Identifies what data should be entered into the input field.

members.name: maxlength
members.description: Sets the maximum number of characters a user can enter into the field.

members.name: minlength
members.description: Sets the minimum number of characters a user can enter into the field.

members.name: name
members.description: Sets a name for the input control.

members.name: required
members.description: Indicates a value is required.

members.name: showCharCount
members.description: Displays a character counter at the bottom right corner below the input field.

members.name: showClearButton
members.description: Displays a clear button in the input field when it contains a value and is focused or hovered. Deletes input value when activated.

members.name: showIndicator
members.description: Adds a visual indicator next to the label. Indicates that a value is optional(by default) or required if the `required` property is also set.

events.description: Dispatched when the value of the input has changed and input loses focus. Event payload includes the value of the input and can be accessed via `e.detail.value`.
events.name: jh-change

events.name: jh-input

events.description: Dispatched when the clear button is activated. Event payload contains the previous value of the input field before it was cleared and can be accessed via `e.detail.previousValue`.

The toast controller component manages multiple toasts. Toasts can be generated and appended to the controller either by a DOM based method or an event based method.

[Toast Controller Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-toast-controller--docs)

declarations.description:
Tooltips are floating components that appears when a user hovers or focuses onto an originating element 
such as a button, icon or link. They display additional information about the originating element which is not 
critical in nature.

[Tooltip Storybook Documentation](https://release-v2--68f8e6a25b256d0ef89b13e6.chromatic.com/?path=/docs/components-tooltip--docs)
declarations.name: JhTooltip

cssProperties.description: The tooltip and arrow background-color. Defaults to `--jh-color-content-primary-enabled`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-tooltip-color-background

cssProperties.description: The tooltip text color. Defaults to `--jh-color-content-on-primary-enabled`.
cssProperties.name: --jh-tooltip-color-text

slots.description: Use to insert the element that triggers the tooltip.
slots.name: default

members.name: flipDisabled
members.description: Determines whether the tooltip flips to a different position when it reaches the edge of the viewport.

members.name: label
members.description: Provides information about the item which triggered the tooltip.

members.name: open
members.description: Determines whether the tooltip is open or closed. Can be set on the tooltip to force it open.

members.name: position
members.description: The position of the tooltip and its arrow.
